source_pr.title: util: fix data race in the TestGetCPUProfile
source_pr.body:

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

symptoms: util: fix data race in the TestGetCPUProfile
failure_signature: util: fix data race in the TestGetCPUProfile
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: util: fix data race in the TestGetCPUProfile.
